product_overview: Mobile-first multi-step web form that guides Eltex customers through uploading identity and property documents, applying region-specific legal signatures, optionally completing an energy-certificate survey, and submitting a project; assessors review submissions via an admin dashboard.
core_goals: Allow customers to locate and continue their installation project by entering a Spanish phone number and using the project code in the URL
Collect required identity and property documents (DNI/NIE, IBI, electricity bill, optional CUPS) and let customers confirm extracted data
Collect region-specific signed legal authorizations when required by province
Collect or allow skipping of a multi-step energy certificate survey and capture a signature for the certificate
Provide an assessor-facing dashboard to review submissions and download complete project ZIP archives
Keep customer sessions recoverable on the same device via local backups so users can pause and resume the flow

features.name: Project access via phone number
features.description: Customers start by providing their Spanish phone number to locate their project and open the form session identified by a query-code in the URL.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter Spanish phone number -> Submit phone number -> Be redirected to /?code=ELT20250001 -> See the first step determined by saved project state
Navigate to / -> Enter an incorrectly formatted phone number -> Submit phone number -> See phone number validation error and remain on the entry step

features.name: Property document upload
features.description: Customers upload identity (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, electricity bill pages and optionally a CUPS contract, review AI-extracted data, and confirm each document.
user_flows: Navigate to /property-docs -> Upload identity document (photo or PDF) -> Upload IBI certificate (photo or PDF) -> Upload electricity bill pages (photo or PDF) -> Optionally upload CUPS contract (PDF) -> Review extracted data for each upload -> Confirm uploads and continue
Navigate to /property-docs -> Upload DNI front-only image detected as card-front -> Observe prompt to provide DNI back-side -> Upload DNI back-side -> Confirm both sides are saved and continue

features.name: DNI/NIE upload rules
features.description: Enforces identity-document-specific requirements: DNI card front-only requires back-side; combined front+back or NIE certificate/card do not require a back-side.
user_flows: Navigate to /property-docs -> Upload DNI card front-only -> Observe requirement to upload back-side -> Upload back-side -> Confirm identity document requirement satisfied
Navigate to /property-docs -> Upload NIE certificate (single document) -> Observe no back-side required -> Confirm identity document requirement satisfied

features.name: Province selection and smart routing
features.description: Customer selects their province to determine whether legal signing is required and which documents must be signed; the app routes the customer to the appropriate next step.
user_flows: Navigate to /province-selection -> Select Cataluña -> Observe that 3 legal signatures are required -> Continue to /representation
Navigate to /province-selection -> Select Madrid -> Observe that 2 legal signatures are required -> Continue to /representation
Navigate to /province-selection -> Select Other province -> Observe that signing is skipped -> Continue to /energy-certificate or /review depending on saved progress

features.name: Representation / legal signing
features.description: Customers sign the required region-specific legal PDFs using an on-screen signature pad; signatures are applied to PDF templates and confirmed by the customer.
user_flows: Navigate to /representation -> For each required legal PDF, Sign the document using the signature pad -> Confirm each signed PDF is applied -> Continue to /energy-certificate or /review
Navigate to /representation after selecting Other province -> Observe that signing step is skipped -> Continue to /energy-certificate or /review

features.name: Energy certificate survey
features.description: Optional four-step survey that collects housing technical data, captures openings and thermal systems info, records additional sales/customer info, and collects a signature for the completed certificate.
user_flows: Navigate to /energy-certificate -> Complete housing data step (cadastral reference, area, floors, height, bedrooms) -> Complete openings step (doors/windows orientation, frame, glass, shutters) -> Complete thermal systems step (water heater, boiler fuel, AC, heating emitters) -> Complete additional info step (product sold, existing customer) -> Sign the completed certificate -> Continue to /review
Navigate to /energy-certificate -> Choose to skip the energy-certificate survey -> Continue to /review

features.name: Review and submit
features.description: Customers review a checklist of required items, fix incomplete items if needed, and submit the consolidated project to Eltex; a success confirmation is shown on completion.
user_flows: Navigate to /review -> See checklist with completion status for identity, property docs, province/signing, energy certificate -> Navigate back to any listed incomplete step and complete missing items -> Return to /review -> Submit the project -> See submission confirmation screen
Navigate to /review -> See an incomplete required item listed -> Return to the referenced step -> Correct the incomplete item -> Return to /review and submit

features.name: Admin dashboard for assessors
features.description: Assessors authenticate to an internal dashboard to list submitted projects, inspect uploaded documents and extracted data, download a full project ZIP, and export project lists as CSV.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter admin password -> See list of submitted projects with summary columns -> Select a project from the list -> View uploaded documents, extracted data, and signatures for the project -> Download project ZIP
Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter admin password -> See list of projects -> Export projects list as CSV

features.name: Offline resilience and session recovery
features.description: The form progressively saves customer progress to local backups so customers can pause, leave the device, and later return to continue from their last saved step without losing uploads or entered data.
user_flows: Start the multi-step form at any step -> Make progress and wait for the auto-save to run -> Leave the browser or reload the page -> Navigate back to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Observe the previous session and entered data restored -> Continue from the last saved step

While on /property-docs, Take photos and add form entries without submitting -> Observe progressive local backup saves -> Close and reopen the browser -> Navigate to /property-docs with the same project code -> Observe photos and inputs present and continue

features.name: Customer document upload flow
features.description: Multi-step mobile-first form guiding customers through uploading identity documents (DNI/NIE front/back), IBI certificate, electricity bill, and optionally a CUPS contract. Accessed via ?code=ELTXXXXXX URL param.
steps: property document uploads (DNI/NIE, IBI, electricity bill, CUPS contract)

features.name: Document signing with PDF overlays
features.description: Customers sign region-specific legal PDFs using a canvas-based signature pad. Cataluña requires 3 signed docs; Madrid/Valencia require 2; other provinces skip signing.

features.name: DNI/NIE document rules
features.description: DNI card front → back required; combined image → back not required; NIE certificate/card → front only sufficient.

features.name: Admin dashboard
features.description: Internal dashboard for Eltex assessors to review customer submissions, view uploaded documents, and download ZIPs of all project files. Authenticated via x-dashboard-token header with password eltex2025.

features.name: Offline resilience
features.description: localStorage + IndexedDB backup with 2-second debounce auto-save, beforeunload flush, and progressive background photo pre-upload.

auth.admin: HTTP header x-dashboard-token with value eltex2025
